title: sweech list/usage --json schemaVersion 3 with top-level providers tree
description: Replace the flat top-level `accounts: [...]` array in `sweech list --json` and `sweech usage --json` with `{schemaVersion: 3, providers: [{accounts: [{workspaces: [...]}]}]}`. NOT SHIPPED — the user stopped wave-6 mid-flight after a redesign over-reach. The branch is preserved at tag wave6/T-071-keep (commit cc2a24c) for future revival. Picking this up will also require T-073 + T-074 in lockstep (SwiftBar + widget consumers).

context.text: Implementation already exists at tag wave6/T-071-keep: +1639/-221 lines, 16 new tests, schema-v3 envelope sample documented in commit cc2a24c. Deferred because reviving requires also reviving T-073 (SwiftBar consumer) and T-074 (widget consumer) — user explicitly didn't want that scope.

acceptanceCriteria: sweech list text output groups by provider; accounts shown as sub-headers; workspaces as rows
sweech list --json emits {providers: [...]} top-level; no legacy `accounts: [...]` field
Regression tests lock the new shape (snapshot + @ts-expect-error type lock)
Default text output for `sweech list` (no flags) preserves utilization bars and reset-window readout
